platform.label: Xiaohongshu
platform.description: XHS image-text note and cover workflow.

artifact_type.label: Note
artifact_type.description: Text note with optional cover image.

image_source.label: Market evidence
image_source.description: Use collected hot-note images as inspiration/evidence references.

image_source.label: Generated only
image_source.description: Generate a cover without image references.

cover_strategy.label: Auto
cover_strategy.description: Let Nori choose references and write the image prompt.

cover_strategy.label: Manual references
cover_strategy.description: User or frontend provides selected reference image paths.

cover_strategy.label: Text-only prompt
cover_strategy.description: Skip reference images and generate from prompt only.

human_gate_mode.label: Skip
human_gate_mode.description: Default local mode; record gate as skipped and continue.

human_gate_mode.label: Pause
human_gate_mode.description: Stop before gated stage and wait for human approval.

entry_mode.label: Direct action
entry_mode.description: Call a concrete content capability route.

entry_mode.label: Workflow
entry_mode.description: Run an orchestrated workflow such as content-production.
